mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question_record (knowledge_base_id, question, normalized_question, question_hash, answer, answer_status, source_type, hit_type, similarity_score, source_chunk_ids, source_document_ids, es_question_id, model_name, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, cost_time_ms, hit_count, useful_count, useless_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{knowledgeBaseId}, #{question}, #{normalizedQuestion}, #{questionHash}, #{answer}, COALESCE(#{answerStatus}, 'DRAFT'), #{sourceType}, #{hitType}, #{similarityScore}, #{sourceChunkIds}, #{sourceDocumentIds}, #{esQuestionId}, #{modelName}, #{promptTokens}, #{completionTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{costTimeMs}, 0, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE question_record SET answer_status = #{answerStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE question_record SET answer = #{answer}, answer_status = #{answerStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM question_record WHERE question_hash = #{questionHash} AND answer_status = 'VERIFIED' AND knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM question_record WHERE question_hash = #{questionHash} AND answer_status = 'VERIFIED' AND knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM question_record WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE question_record SET hit_count = hit_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE question_record SET answer_status = 'VERIFIED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE question_record SET answer_status = 'DISABLED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE question_record SET answer_status = 'STALE', updated_at = NOW() WHERE answer_status = 'VERIFIED' AND FIND_IN_SET(#{documentId}, source_document_ids)
UPDATE question_record SET es_question_id = #{esQuestionId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
